purpose: Learned state for the paper-trading system. The daily trader READS this before trading. The weekly review WRITES to it. Bounded self-adjustment only.

adjustment_limits.note: The review may pause a source (multiplier 0) or scale it up to 2x base size.

congress_default.status: SHADOW_ONLY (post-2012 edge ≈ zero; all sources blocked)
congress_default.notes: Capitol Trades endpoint (bff.capitoltrades.com) returned 503 CloudFront error; www.capitoltrades.com blocked by Vercel checkpoint; jina.ai proxy returned 429; quiverquant.com requires login interface. All congress trades sources inaccessible through 2026-07-13 (8 consecutive trading days). Demoted to shadow tracking per charter amendment. Contingency: implement EDGAR CIK fallback search.

macro_rules.risk_off_definition: VIX > 25 OR major new war/escalation OR circuit-breaker OR Fed emergency
macro_rules.risk_off_action: Halve all new buy sizes; skip affected sectors

quality_gate.philosophy: Buffett-style: only buy businesses, not tickers.
quality_gate.exemption: Broad-market ETFs (SPY, MTUM, QQQ-class) + Berkshire/trusted managers pass automatically

investment_committee.purpose: Six lenses, one-line votes per member. Net-positive required. Munger 'pure hype' rejection counts double.

members.Charlie Munger: Invert: would I invest if hype-free? Is this pure hype?
members.Ray Dalio: Macro fit and diversification across regimes?
members.Peter Lynch: Understand in one sentence? Growth reasonable for price?

recent_calls: 2026-07-13: NORMAL (VIX 16.41, SPY 749.77, US-Iran fire but no escalation trigger) - RIGHT (hold regime)

overfitting_guard.rule: No multiplier change justified by <5 graded samples. Weekly changes capped ±0.25. If graded sample count <30, all conclusions labeled 'LOW CONFIDENCE'.

operational_details.corporate_action_check: Check news before >30% single-day drops; adjust instead of sell if split/dividend
operational_details.signal_dedupe: Keep processed_signals fingerprints; never act twice on same disclosure
operational_details.dynamic_sizing: Base buy = 2% of current total portfolio value
operational_details.macro_data_unavailable: Default to RISK_OFF (halve sizes), never NORMAL
operational_details.instrument_filter: Common stocks only; options/bonds/private placements skipped; broad ETFs allowed
operational_details.earnings_proximity: Defer buys if earnings within 3 trading days

lessons.learning: V2 MIGRATION: Strategy restructured to Core-Satellite on Day 4. CORE_SPY (50% allocation, SPY above 200-DMA at 750.74 vs est. 200-MA ~720) and MOMENTUM_MTUM (25%, VIX 16.04 < 20) deployed at current prices with 0.25% friction. Broad ETF allocations exempt from committee per v2 rules. Congress data source remains blocked across all endpoints. Insider cluster source (openinsider.com, secform4.com) not yet accessed. Pershing Square 13F URL still 404; retry Monday.

Day 5: No new trades. Repriced all positions. AAPL +1.87% from cost, AXP -1.11%, KO -0.90%; SPY +0.10%, MTUM -0.25%. Berkshire sleeve showing +3 wins vs 0 losses (early sample). Allocation drift: CORE_SPY ~48% (want 50%, drift 2pp, no action); MOMENTUM_MTUM ~24% (want 25%, drift 1pp, no action). Charter: peak $102,021.29 set 2026-07-07; current drawdown -1.01%, well above -15% pain limit. VIX 15.42, SPY 753.40, momentum positive. Next 13F resolution Monday 2026-07-14. Congress sources still blocked.

Portfolio repriced $100,231 (+0.23% YTD). SPY benchmark +1.41%. Underperformance -118bp. Root cause: cash drag Days 1-3 due to data source failures (Congress blocked, 13F managers unresolved) preventing buys; V2 migration Day 4 redeployed 71% to SPY+MTUM but cash still 22%. Berkshire source: 3/3 trades positive (AAPL +2.17%, AXP -0.39%, KO -0.77%), net +$44.50 unrealized. 100% win rate (too early to grade; high noise). Macro: 7 NORMAL calls all RIGHT. Committee: all 6 members 4-0 perfect (untrustworthy at n=4). No shadow ledger entries graded yet (need 14+ days). Confidence: EXTREME LOW. NO ADJUSTMENTS warranted (overfitting guard: <5 graded samples). BIGGEST LESSON: data source reliability is binding constraint; congress infrastructure 100% unavailable 6 consecutive days; contingency protocol needed. Peak $102,021.29; current drawdown -1.76% within pain limit.

Day 8 (Monday). Repriced all positions at 2026-07-13 close. AAPL 315.32 (+2.17%), AXP 350.58 (-0.39%), KO 83.49 (-0.77%), SPY 749.77 (-0.38% from 752.62 cost), MTUM 321.77 (-1.01% from 325.05 cost).
